verses.text: The kings' hearts melt at the news of the crossing. Fear. God's act terrifies the foe.
Joshua circumcises the new generation. Circumcised. The covenant sign is renewed.
Joshua circumcises the new generation. Circumcised. The covenant sign is renewed.
That generation born in the wilderness had not been circumcised. Renewed. The neglect is set right.
That generation born in the wilderness had not been circumcised. Renewed. The neglect is set right.
That generation born in the wilderness had not been circumcised. Renewed. The neglect is set right.
That generation born in the wilderness had not been circumcised. Renewed. The neglect is set right.
They rest till healed; the place is named Gilgal. Gilgal. The reproach is rolled away.
They rest till healed; the place is named Gilgal. Gilgal. The reproach is rolled away.
They keep the passover; the manna ceases. Manna ceases. They eat the land's own fruit.
They keep the passover; the manna ceases. Manna ceases. They eat the land's own fruit.
They keep the passover; the manna ceases. Manna ceases. They eat the land's own fruit.
The captain of the LORD's host appears; Joshua worships. The captain. God Himself leads the war.
The captain of the LORD's host appears; Joshua worships. The captain. God Himself leads the war.
The captain of the LORD's host appears; Joshua worships. The captain. God Himself leads the war.
